title: YOUNG LIFE - 211info
text: YOUNG LIFE YOUNG LIFE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social development and enrichment activities and camps in a Christian faith-based environment. Eligibility: Youth in middle school through college Hours: Varies by event (877) 438-9572 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (877) 438-9572 Administration INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Youth Issues Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNGLIVES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
